top_signals.title: SARB Will Respond to Above-Target CPI Expectations, Kganyago Says
top_signals.summary: South African Reserve Bank Governor Lesetja Kganyago discusses the outlook for inflation and monetary policy. He talks with Bloomberg's Francine Lacqua at the ECB Forum on Central Banking in Sintra, Portugal. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Container Shipping: Why Rates are Skyrocketing (It’s NOT Demand)
top_signals.summary:
Container spot rates from China to the US West Coast have surged over 300% from March to June. FreightWaves' Craig Fuller breaks down why this isn't a demand-driven surge, but a reflection of concentrated power among international ocean carriers. Discover how foreign-owned shipping lines operate as a cartel, manipulating capacity and impacting US businesses. Plus, get insights on the domestic trucking market's holiday capacity crunch and how RXO provides crucial support.

The post Container Shipping: Why Rates are Skyrocketing (It’s NOT Demand) appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.summary: Gold falls as higher Treasury yields, Fed rate hike bets weigh  Reuters

top_signals.title: Nike Sees Weakness Persisting as Investors Grow Impatient
top_signals.summary: Nike Inc. executives gave a cautious outlook and warned about elevated consumer anxiety, adding to investor concerns about the sportswear company’s painfully slow turnaround.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin ETFs lose record $4.5B in June, eclipsing Strategy's $1.25B raise
top_signals.summary: US spot Bitcoin ETFs logged record $4.5 billion in June outflows, pushing year-to-date totals to $5.5 billion, signaling an unprecedented pace of withdrawals.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Microsoft accelerates quantum-safe roadmap as risks grow
top_signals.summary: Microsoft announced today that it is accelerating its quantum-safe security roadmap, saying advances in quantum computing are bringing the need to replace today's encryption standards sooner than previously expected. [...]
